name: Avocado Toast
hint: A popular breakfast dish made with mashed avocado spread on toast, often topped with various ingredients like eggs, tomatoes, or spices.

name: Burger
hint: A delicious sandwich made with a patty of ground meat, typically beef, and various toppings.

name: Curry
hint: A variety of dishes from different cultures, typically consisting of a spiced sauce and ingredients like meat, vegetables, or legumes.

name: Dim Sum
hint: A Chinese meal of small plates, often served with tea, containing a variety of dumplings, buns, and other savory items.

name: Egg Roll
hint: A Chinese appetizer consisting of a rolled-up pastry filled with ingredients like cabbage, pork, and shrimp, then deep-fried.

name: Falafel
hint: A Middle Eastern dish made from ground chickpeas or fava beans, often served in a pita with tahini sauce.

name: Gyoza
hint: Japanese dumplings typically filled with ground meat and vegetables, then pan-fried or steamed.

name: Hamburger
hint: A classic sandwich made with a beef patty, typically served in a bun with various toppings.

name: Inarizushi
hint: A type of sushi from Japan consisting of vinegared rice packed in a pocket of seasoned, marinated tofu.

name: Jiaozi
hint: Chinese dumplings filled with meat, seafood, or vegetables, often served steamed or boiled.

name: Koy Teav
hint: A Cambodian noodle soup made with rice noodles and often served with pork or beef.

name: Laksa
hint: A spicy noodle soup with origins in Southeast Asia, often containing coconut milk, shrimp, and other ingredients.

name: Maki Roll
hint: A type of sushi roll, typically containing rice, fish, and vegetables, wrapped in seaweed and sliced into bite-sized pieces.

name: Noodle
hint: Long, thin strips of dough often boiled or stir-fried and used in various dishes.

name: Okonomiyaki
hint: A Japanese savory pancake, often made with a batter of flour, eggs, shredded cabbage, and various toppings.

name: Pad Thai
hint: A popular Thai stir-fried noodle dish often made with shrimp or chicken, and flavored with tamarind and peanuts.

name: Quesadilla
hint: A Mexican dish consisting of a tortilla filled with cheese and often other ingredients, folded in half and cooked until the cheese is melted.

name: Ramen
hint: A Japanese noodle soup dish with Chinese origins, typically served in a meat or fish-based broth.

name: Sushi
hint: A Japanese dish consisting of vinegared rice combined with various ingredients, often seafood and vegetables.

name: Taco
hint: A Mexican dish consisting of a folded or rolled tortilla filled with various ingredients, often including seasoned meat, cheese, and vegetables.

name: Udon
hint: A type of thick wheat noodle commonly used in Japanese cuisine.

name: Vindaloo
hint: A spicy Indian curry dish typically made with meat, often pork, and flavored with vinegar and spices.

name: Wonton Soup
hint: A Chinese soup featuring wontons, which are small dumplings filled with meat or seafood, in a flavorful broth.

name: Xiaolongbao
hint: A type of Chinese steamed bun filled with meat or soup, often enjoyed as a dim sum dish.

name: Yogurt
hint: A dairy product made by fermenting milk with bacterial cultures, often flavored and sweetened.

name: Ziti
hint: A type of pasta that is shaped like long, narrow tubes, often used in Italian dishes.
